title: Campaigns | Andy MacNae MP
meta_description: Click on the links below to follow some of my campaigns to make our local area a fairer, greener and safer place for all.
text_excerpt: Campaigns | Andy MacNae MP >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 01254 476410 / 01706 489387 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS SAFER ROADS LINKS CONTACT CAMPAIGNS Click on the links below to follow some of Labour’s campaigns to make our local area a fairer, greener and safer place for all. Facebook X-twitter Envelope ECONOMIC GROWTH GET BRITAIN BUILDING AGAIN Good jobs and productivity growth in every part of the country making everyone, not just a few, better off. Details CLEAN ENERGY Great British Energy British people are facing challenges with higher bills. The only way to cut energy bills is to shift to clean, low carbon power. Details NHS & HEALTH Get the NHS back on its feet There when people need it; with fewer lives lost to the biggest killers; in a fairer Britain, where everyone lives well for longer. Details SAFER STREETS Take back our streets Labour believes that feeling secure is the bedrock on which opportunities are built, and communities can thrive. Details OPPORTUNITY barriers to opportunity Reform the childcare and education systems, raise standards everywhere, and prepare young people for work and life. Details HELP US WIN VOLUNTEERING WITH LABOUR Be part of the team that delivers a Labour government. Over 50,000 people have already pledged. Details GET IN TOUCH As your local MP, I can help you with, or offer advice on, issues such as; benefits, immigration, tax, the NHS, child maintenance and education. I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. 01254 476410 / 01706 489387 andy.macnae.mp@parliament.uk Contact (Footer) Newsletter Full Name Email Phone/Mobile Address Message I have read & agree to the Privacy Policy (Required) Sign up to campaign updates Sign me up for email updates with news & campaign developments. Submit Social Network Get Involved Please use the contact form here to get in touch with me and find out more about my campaigns, priorities and how to get involved. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your full contact details.
